features: DARE TO DREAM Launched in 2022, the newest edition to the Lovely scent family is inspired by the energy of New York City and the Spirit of Broadway Alluring and invigorating, the fragrance sparkles with florals, lush woods, and sensual musks
ALLURING AND ENTICING Lovely Lights arrives with notes of Honeysuckle, Mandarin Orange and Neroli, easing to a heart of Gardenia, Jasmine and Casheran, with a finish of Musk, Amber, and Sandalwood

SEE THE CITY LIGHTS Emblazoned a bright logo inspired by the lights of the big city, Lovely Lights dazzles with creamy pink tones and an enchanting gold cap design The perfect trendy addition to your nightstand or perfume collection

BEAUTIFUL, RARE, AND ALWAYS UNEXPECTED A connoisseur of fragrance, the iconic actress and designer Sarah Jessica Parker’s expansion into the world of perfume has yielded a world of enticing and highly curated fragrances
description: Product Description Sarah Jessica Parker - actor, producer, businesswoman, and designer - has been fascinated with and enamored by scent since she was a young girl, so the step to develop a fragrance collection was an obvious one. In 2005, SJP released her first signature fragrance, LOVELY. Over a decade later, LOVELY remains a top seller globally, and has become a go-to scent for women of all ages, everywhere. In the years to follow, SJP has remained on top of the market, expanding her fragrance collection and crafting a wide range of perfumes, body mists, and self-care products. Ingredients Alcohol Denat., Fragrance (Parfum), Water (Aqua), Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Butyl Methoxydibenzzoylmethane, Benzyl Salicylate, Hexyl Cinnamal, Linalool, Limonene, Hydroxycitronellal, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Farnesol, Geraniol, Citronellol, Coumarin, Citral, Benzyl Alcohol, Benzyl Benzoate. Directions Apply 2-3 sprays to pulse points (wrists, neck, behind ears). Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources. See more
